remediation: No 'google_sql_database_instance' resource based on POSTGRES should set the 'log_min_duration_statement' flag to a value that is not '-1'
title: Beta - SQL DB Instance With Minimum Log Duration

remediation: Cloud SQL Database Instance should have SSL enabled
title: SQL DB Instance With SSL Disabled

remediation: Kubernetes Engine Clusters must have Network Policy enabled, meaning that the attribute 'network_policy.enabled' must be true and the attribute 'addons_config.network_policy_config.disabled' must be false
title: Network Policy Disabled

remediation: Running outdated versions of Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE) can expose it to known vulnerabilities and attacks. To reduce these risks, it is recommended to ensure that GKE is always running the latest version.
title: Outdated GKE Version

remediation: All 'google_sql_database_instance' resources based on POSTGRES should have the 'log_min_error_statement' flag set to 'ERROR' or a higher severity to prevent excessive logging
title: Beta - SQL DB Instance With Unrecommended Error Logging Threshold

remediation: This query confirms if Google Compute SSL Policy Weak Chyper Suits is Enabled, to do so we need to check if TLS is TLS_1_2, because other version have Weak Chypers
title: Google Compute SSL Policy Weak Cipher In Use

remediation: KMS Crypto Key should not be publicly accessible. In other words, the KMS Crypto Key policy should not set 'allUsers' or 'allAuthenticatedUsers' in the attribute 'member'/'members'
title: KMS Crypto Key is Publicly Accessible

remediation: A 'google_sql_database_instance' resource based on SQLSERVER should have the 'user connections' database flag unset or set to a non-limiting value (default 0). A small positive value may artificially limit concurrent connections and cause dropped requests or outages.
title: Beta - SQL DB Instance With Limited User Connections

remediation: Compute instances must be launched with Shielded VM enabled, which means the attribute 'shielded_instance_config' must be defined and its sub attributes 'enable_secure_boot', 'enable_vtpm' and 'enable_integrity_monitoring' must be set to true
title: Shielded VM Disabled

remediation: All 'google_sql_database_instance' resources based on SQLSERVER should enable the 'external scripts enabled' flag to 'off' to prevent malicious code injection attempts
title: Beta - SQL DB Instance With External Scripts Enabled

remediation: Kubernetes Engine Clusters should not be configured to use the default service account
title: GKE Using Default Service Account

remediation: Google Compute Network should not use a firewall rule that allows all ports
title: Google Compute Network Using Firewall Rule that Allows All Ports

remediation: All 'google_sql_database_instance' resources based on POSTGRES should enable the 'cloudsql.enable_pgaudit' flag to allow for centralized logging
title: Beta - SQL DB Instance Without Centralized Logging

remediation: Kubernetes Engine Clusters must have Stackdriver Monitoring enabled, which means the attribute 'monitoring_service' must be defined and different than 'none'
title: Stackdriver Monitoring Disabled

remediation: Verifies that the OSLogin is enabled
title: OSLogin Disabled

remediation: Resources google_monitoring_alert_policy and google_logging_metric filter fields should capture a logging metric whose filter contains protoPayload.methodName=`SetIamPolicy` AND protoPayload.serviceData.policyDelta.auditConfigDeltas:*. Both conditions must be joined with AND. Also, the google_monitoring_alert_policy notification_channels should be defined on google_monitoring_alert_policy.
title: Beta - Logs And Alerts Missing Audit Configuration Changes

remediation: Instances should not be configured to use the Default Service Account, that has full access to all Cloud APIs, which means the attribute 'service_account' and its sub attribute 'email' must be defined. Additionally, 'email' must not be empty and must also not be a default Google Compute Engine service account.
title: Using Default Service Account

remediation: VM Instance should block project-wide SSH keys
title: Project-wide SSH Keys Are Enabled In VM Instances

remediation: This query checks if logs are enabled for a Google Compute Subnetwork resource.
title: Google Compute Subnetwork Logging Disabled

remediation: Google Compute Network should not use default firewall rule
title: Google Compute Network Using Default Firewall Rule

remediation: Enabling Integrity Monitoring for Shielded GKE Nodes is necessary to be notified of inconsistencies during the node boot sequence.
title: Beta - Shielded GKE Node Do Not Have Integrity Monitoring Enabled

remediation: Kubernetes Engine Clusters must have Stackdriver Logging enabled, which means the attribute 'logging_service' must be defined and different from 'none'
title: Stackdriver Logging Disabled

remediation: The 'google_project_service.service' field must include 'cloudasset.googleapis.com' to allow Cloud Asset Inventory
title: Beta - Cloud Asset Inventory Disabled

remediation: All 'google_sql_database_instance' resources based on 'MYSQL' should disable the 'local_infile' flag to prevent unwanted exposure
title: Beta - SQL DB Instance With Local Data Loading Enabled

remediation: GKE cluster nodes must be launched with Shielded VM enabled, which means the attribute 'enable_shielded_nodes' must be set to 'true'.
title: Shielded GKE Nodes Disabled

remediation: Verifies if the Google Project Auto Create Network is Disabled
title: Google Project Auto Create Network Disabled

remediation: No 'google_sql_database_instance' resource based on SQLSERVER should enable the deprecated 'cross db ownership chaining'
title: Beta - SQL DB Instance With Ownership Chaining Enabled

remediation: Kubernetes Engine Clusters must have Legacy Authorization set to disabled, which means the attribute 'enable_legacy_abac' must not be true
title: GKE Legacy Authorization Enabled

remediation: DNSSEC must be enabled for Cloud DNS
title: Cloud DNS Without DNSSEC

remediation: Verifies if Google Project IAM Binding Service Account doesn't have an Account User or Token Creator Role associated
title: Google Project IAM Binding Service Account has Token Creator or Account User Role

remediation: Kubernetes Clusters must be configured with labels, which means the attribute 'resource_labels' must be defined
title: Cluster Labels Disabled

remediation: Check if the Google compute firewall allows unrestricted RDP access. Allowed ports should not contain RDP port 3389
title: RDP Access Is Not Restricted

remediation: Resources google_monitoring_alert_policy and google_logging_metric filter fields should capture a logging metric whose filter contains resource.type=`iam_role` AND explicitly uses OR between all method values: protoPayload.methodName=`google.iam.admin.v1.CreateRole` OR `google.iam.admin.v1.DeleteRole` OR `google.iam.admin.v1.UpdateRole` OR `google.iam.admin.v1.UndeleteRole`. OR operators must be present and notification_channels defined on google_monitoring_alert_policy.
title: Beta - Logs And Alerts Missing Custom Role Changes

remediation: Kubernetes Clusters must be created with Private Clusters enabled, meaning the 'private_cluster_config' must be defined and the attributes 'enable_private_nodes' and 'enable_private_endpoint' must be true
title: Private Cluster Disabled

remediation: Legacy networks can have an impact for high network traffic projects and are subject to a single point of contention or failure.
title: Beta - Legacy Networks Do Not Exist For Older Google Projects

remediation: As a best practice, it is better to assign an IAM Role to a group than to a user
title: User with IAM Role

remediation: Kubernetes Clusters must use the default OAuth authentication, which means 'master_auth' must either be undefined or have 'client_certificate_config' with the attribute 'issue_client_certificate' equal to false
title: Legacy Client Certificate Auth Enabled

remediation: It is advisable to set up Essential Contacts to specify email addresses that Google Cloud can use to send important technical or security notifications.
title: Beta - Ensure Essential Contacts Is Configured For Organization

remediation: Verifies that Google Project IAM Member Service Account doesn't have an Admin Role associated
title: Google Project IAM Member Service Account Has Admin Role

remediation: All 'google_sql_database_instance' resources based on POSTGRES should enable the 'log_disconnections' flag to log disconnections
title: Beta - SQL DB Instance Without Disconnections Logging

remediation: Audit Logging Configuration is defective
title: IAM Audit Not Properly Configured

remediation: The node image should be Container-Optimized OS(COS)
title: COS Node Image Not Used

remediation: Alpha clusters are not covered by an SLA and are not production-ready
title: Beta - Google Kubernetes Engine Cluster Has Alpha Features Enabled

remediation: Kubernetes Clusters must have Pod Security Policy controller enabled, which means there must be a 'pod_security_policy_config' with the 'enabled' attribute equal to true
title: Pod Security Policy Disabled

remediation: Google Project IAM Policy should not assign a KMS admin role and CryptoKey role to the same member
title: KMS Admin and CryptoKey Roles In Use

remediation: Gmail accounts are being used instead of corporate credentials
title: Not Proper Email Account In Use

remediation: Google Compute Engine VM instances should not enable serial ports. When enabled, anyone can access your VM, if they know the username, project ID, SSH key, instance name and zone
title: Serial Ports Are Enabled For VM Instances

remediation: All 'google_container_cluster' resources should enable network policy support. Network policies can provide better security by limiting connections between pods thus reducing compromise radius
title: Beta - Cluster Without Network Policy Support Enabled

remediation: Cloud Storage Buckets must not be anonymously or publicly accessible, which means the attribute 'members' must not possess 'allUsers' or 'allAuthenticatedUsers'
title: Cloud Storage Anonymous or Publicly Accessible

remediation: Resources google_monitoring_alert_policy and google_logging_metric filter fields should capture a logging metric whose filter defines protoPayload.serviceName=`cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com` AND (ProjectOwnership OR projectOwnerInvitee) OR (bindingDeltas.action=`REMOVE` AND bindingDeltas.role=`roles/owner`) OR (bindingDeltas.action=`ADD` AND bindingDeltas.role=`roles/owner`). All AND/OR operators must be explicit and notification_channels defined on google_monitoring_alert_policy.
title: Beta - Logs And Alerts Missing Project Ownership Assignment And Changes

remediation: Google Container Node Pool Auto Repair should be enabled. This service periodically checks for failing nodes and repairs them to ensure a smooth running state.
title: Google Container Node Pool Auto Repair Disabled

remediation: Kubernetes nodes must have auto upgrades set to true, which means Node 'auto_upgrade' should be enabled for Kubernetes Clusters
title: Node Auto Upgrade Disabled

remediation: Cloud SQL instances should not be publicly accessible.
title: SQL DB Instance Publicly Accessible

remediation: VM disks for critical VMs must be encrypted with Customer Supplied Encryption Keys (CSEK) or with Customer-managed encryption keys (CMEK), which means the attribute 'disk_encryption_key' must be defined and its sub attributes 'raw_key' or 'kms_key_self_link' must also be defined
title: Disk Encryption Disabled

remediation: All 'google_sql_database_instance' resources based on MYSQL should enable the 'skip_show_database' flag to prevent unwanted exposure
title: Beta - SQL DB Instance With Exposed Show Privileges

remediation: Google Storage Bucket Level Access should be enabled
title: Google Storage Bucket Level Access Disabled

remediation: A VM instance is configured to use the default service account with full access to all Cloud APIs
title: VM With Full Cloud Access

remediation: Cloud Storage Bucket is anonymously or publicly accessible
title: Cloud Storage Bucket Is Publicly Accessible

remediation: Release Channel should be subscribed to Regular or Stable to automate version upgrades to the GKE cluster and to reduce version management complexity to the number of features and level of stability required.
title: Beta - Ensure GKE Version Management Is Automated Using Release Channels

remediation: In a 'google_sql_database_instance' resource based on SQLSERVER, the 'contained database authentication' flag should be set to 'off'
title: Beta - SQL DB Instance With Contained Database Authentication

remediation: Google Firewall should not allow SSH access (port 22) from the Internet (public CIDR block) to ensure the principle of least privileges
title: SSH Access Is Not Restricted

remediation: Kubernetes Clusters must be created with Alias IP ranges enabled, which means the attribut 'ip_allocation_policy' must be defined and, if defined, the attribute 'networking_mode' must be VPC_NATIVE
title: IP Aliasing Disabled

remediation: Verifies if Google Poject IAM Member Service Account doesn't have a Account User or Token Creator associated
title: Google Project IAM Member Service Account has Token Creator or Account User Role

remediation: No 'google_sql_database_instance' resource based on SQLSERVER should define the 'user options' flag
title: Beta - SQL DB Instance With Global User Options

remediation: The 'google_dns_policy' should always have the 'enable_logging' field set to true
title: Beta - Google DNS Policy Logging Disabled

remediation: DNSSEC should not use the RSASHA1 algorithm, which means if, within the 'dnssec_config' block, the 'default_key_specs' block exists with the 'algorithm' field is 'rsasha1' which is bad.
title: DNSSEC Using RSASHA1

remediation: Kubernetes Web UI (Dashboard) should be disabled when running on Kubernetes Engine
title: Beta - Kubernetes Web UI Is Not Disabled

remediation: Service account should not have improper privileges like admin, editor, owner, or write roles
title: Service Account with Improper Privileges

remediation: Checks if backup configuration is enabled for all Cloud SQL Database instances
title: SQL DB Instance Backup Disabled

remediation: Check if any VM instance disables OSLogin
title: OSLogin Is Disabled For VM Instance

remediation: All 'google_sql_database_instance' resources based on SQLSERVER should set the 'remote access' flag to 'off'
title: Beta - SQL DB Instance With Remote Access Enabled

remediation: Cloud storage bucket should have logging enabled
title: Cloud Storage Bucket Logging Not Enabled

remediation: KMS encryption keys should be rotated every 90 days or less. A short lifetime of encryption keys reduces the potential blast radius in case of compromise.
title: High Google KMS Crypto Key Rotation Period

remediation: BigQuery dataset is anonymously or publicly accessible
title: BigQuery Dataset Is Public

remediation: Google Compute Network should not use a firewall rule that allows port range
title: Google Compute Network Using Firewall Rule that Allows Port Range

remediation: Cloud Storage Bucket should have versioning enabled
title: Cloud Storage Bucket Versioning Disabled

remediation: All 'google_sql_database_instance' resources based on POSTGRES should have the 'log_min_messages' flag set to 'WARNING' or a higher severity to prevent excessive logging
title: Beta - SQL DB Instance With Unrecommended Logging Threshold

remediation: Google Compute Subnetwork should have Private Google Access enabled, which means 'private_ip_google_access' should be set to true
title: Google Compute Subnetwork with Private Google Access Disabled

remediation: Instances must not have IP forwarding enabled, which means the attribute 'can_ip_forward' must not be true
title: IP Forwarding Enabled

remediation: All 'google_sql_database_instance' resources based on SQLSERVER should enable the '3625'(trace log) flag to prevent the disclosure of sensitive information
title: Beta - SQL DB Instance With Exposed Trace Logs

remediation: All 'google_sql_database_instance' resources based on POSTGRES should enable the 'log_connections' flag to log connection attempts
title: Beta - SQL DB Instance Without Connections Logging
